GRules.GeneralRules1: Wild Ape #3258 is a 6-reel, 6-row video slot featuring a big Wild symbol with increasing multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{256} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 256 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

GRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 3 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
GCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
GCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

GWildsTransformation.Title: Wild Transformation
GWildsTransformation.WildsTransformationExplaination1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 1 to 3 symbols' spaces may have a gold frame around itself.
GWildsTransformation.WildsTransformationExplaination2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.

GSuperWildApeFeature.Title: Wild Bored Ape Feature
GSuperWildApeFeature.SuperWildApeFeatureExplaination1: At the start of any main game spin, the Wild Bored Ape symbol in reels 3 and 4 is deactivated and is locked by two chained padlocks.
GSuperWildApeFeature.SuperWildApeFeatureExplaination2: Any win in the first round will unlock the first padlock.
GSuperWildApeFeature.SuperWildApeFeatureExplaination3: Any win in the second round will unlock the second padlock and the Wild Bored Ape symbol is activated in the third round.
GSuperWildApeFeature.SuperWildApeFeatureExplaination4: Wild Bored Ape  symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
GSuperWildApeFeature.SuperWildApeFeatureExplaination5: When the Wild Bored Ape symbol is activated, the win multiplier is x2 and is increased by 2 after every win in the subsequent rounds.

GFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the start of the free spin, the Wild Bored Ape symbol is activated with the win multiplier of x2 and is increased by 2 after every win in the subsequent rounds.

GMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is 10000x of the bet amount.
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches 10000x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
